title: Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle Releasing in July - RPGamer
snippet: # Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle Releasing in July. by  Alex Fuller  · Published · Updated. Developer Digitalis Publishing and publisher 15 Industry (Ichigo Industry) have announced that neo-classic digital gamebook RPG *Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle* will release on July 9, 2026. The game will be available for PC via Steam, with a new trailer viewable below that was showcased as part of the BitSummit Punch Mixtape programme. *Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle* is billed as following the spirit of *The NeverEnding Story* and sees players play as either warrior Havelock or mage Paneri, who set out to challenge Ingeborg, the witch inhabiting a dark castle near the plague-stricken capital of Erishing. title: Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle announced - Niche Gamer
snippet: # Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle announced. Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle. Publisher 15Industry and developer Digitalis Publishing announced *Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle,*a “neo-classical digital gamebook RPG” that captures the charm of classic gamebooks. *Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle*is in development for Windows PC (via Steam) with a global release set for this year. Here’s a rundown on the game, plus its reveal trailer:. A neo-classic digital gamebook RPG that reimagines the charm of classic gamebooks for the modern age. Experience the nostalgic feel of scribbling stats with a pencil, rolling dice to decide your fate, and flipping pages by hand. The “authentic fantasy” you crave is right here! ## This upcoming SRPG lets you search characters by “chest size”. ## Gundam Hathaway The Sorcery of Nymph Circe Review. ## Nitro Gen Omega Review. ## Directive 8020 Review. #### Follow Us. title: Digital Gamebook RPG Veritas Tales Witch Of The Dark Castle ...
snippet: # Digital Gamebook RPG ‘Veritas Tales Witch of the Dark Castle’ Launches July 9, 2026. Veritas Tales Witch of the Dark Castle. Digitalis Publishing and developer 15 Industry have announced their digital gamebook RPG *Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle*, launching for PC via Steam on July 9, 2026. The game will support English, Japanese, and Simplified Chinese. The title is inherently determined by decisions and dice rolls, with outcomes that can dramatically change the course of events. The story is set in the plague-stricken capital of Erishing, where a witch resides within the Dark Castle. The gameplay centers on the aforementioned branching decisions and randomized dice rolls that determine success or failure, with the structure mirroring traditional pen-and-paper systems. title: From Vanillaware to a mountain village: Veritas Tales Brings Hand-Drawn Gamebook RPG to Steam This July - Turn Based Lovers
snippet: # From Vanillaware to a mountain village: Veritas Tales Brings Hand-Drawn Gamebook RPG to Steam This July. ## *Crafted over six years by industry veteran Yoshio Nishimura, this choice-driven adventure features art by the Odin Sphere illustrator and a score by Hitoshi Sakimoto.*. **Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle** will launch on Steam on **July 9, 2026**, developer Digitalis Publishing and publisher 15 Industry announced. The game is a single-player fantasy adventure built around the structure of a book, with branching choices, dice rolls, illustrated scenes, and multiple ways to handle danger. Players move through the pages of a fantasy story, face enemies, make choices, and deal with outcomes shaped by dice rolls. The project was created by **Yoshio Nishimura**, founder of *Digitalis Publishing* and a 30-year veteran of the game industry. The result is meant to feel closer to a physical fantasy book, with hand-drawn imagery, paper-like textures, and a slower rhythm built around reading and choice.

title: Gamebook RPG Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle Announced
snippet: # Gamebook RPG Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle Announced. Developer Digitalis Publishing and publisher 15 Industry (Ichigo Industry) have announced *Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle*, a neo-classic digital gamebook RPG in development for PC. *Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle* sees players play as either warrior Havelock or mage Paneri, who set out to challenge Ingeborg, the witch inhabiting a dark castle near the plague-stricken capital of Erishing. title: Veritas Tales: Reviving the gamebook RPG classic – Virus
snippet: # Veritas Tales revives gamebook RPG classics. Home / Previews / Veritas Tales revives gamebook RPG classics. The neo-classical digital RPG Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle brings back the spirit of classic gamebook adventures through a modern approach, combining narrative choices and dice rolling that directly affect the course of the story. **Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle** has been announced, a neo-classical digital gamebook RPG coming to PC via Steam on July 9, 2026, with support for English, Japanese, and Chinese languages. The game is developed by Digitalis Publishing and 15 Industry, and it aims to modernize classic “choose your own adventure” gamebooks by combining narrative choices with dice rolling that directly affects the outcome of the adventure. ### Underchoice is coming to Steam on June 1, players will decide the fate of the inhabitants of the underground shelter.
